My First Blog Post

Jun 24, 2025

Welcome to my blog!

This is my very first post using Jekyll and GitHub Pages. I’m thrilled to finally share my thoughts, ideas, and experiments here. Whether it’s about coding, creativity, or curiosity — this space is where it all begins.

Stay with me as I learn, grow, and explore.
More posts are on the way!

— He Gu
